section.heading: Office of Research and Development

subsection.heading: Office of Research and Development.—
subsection.content: There is in the Veterans Health Administration an Office of Research and Development (in this section referred to as the “Office”).

subsection.heading: Purposes.—
subsection.content: The function of the Office is to serve veterans through a full spectrum of research (including pre-clinical, clinical, and health systems science), technology transfer, and application.

subsection.heading: Chief Research and Development Officer.—
subsection.content: The head of the Office is the Chief Research and Development Officer.

subsection.heading: Organization and Personnel.—
subsection.content: The Office shall be organized in such manner, and its personnel shall perform such duties and have such titles, as the Secretary may prescribe.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 117–328, div. U, title I, § 182(a), Dec. 29, 2022, 136 Stat. 5436.)
